user.title: Configure PiHole Bypass
user.description: Connect to your PiHole server (v6+). Find the API key under Settings > API in the PiHole web interface.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure PiHole Bypass
reconfigure.description: Update the protocol, host or API password.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to PiHole server
error.ssl_error: SSL error – for self-signed certificates please use HTTP
error.api_clients_unavailable: Connected, but /api/clients is unavailable – is PiHole v6 running?
error.api_groups_unavailable: Connected, but /api/groups is unavailable – is PiHole v6 running?
